top_signals.title: Most Emerging Market Currencies Rebound Amid ‘Headline Fatigue’
top_signals.summary: Most emerging-market currencies are rebounding on Thursday from losses the day before as oil edges lower, with investors playing down the scope of resumed hostilities between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MARA shares surge after 2 GW Texas infrastructure deal expands AI ambitions
top_signals.summary: The Bitcoin miner's shares climbed about 15% after announcing it's acquiring a Texas site with up to 2 GW of power capacity to expand its AI and digital infrastructure strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: He Found His Way Out of the Streets in a Prison Cell With a Pamphlet. This Is How Debon “DJ” Sims Built a Trucking Business Nobody Could Take From Him.
top_signals.summary:
The decision that changed Debon Sims’s life got made in a prison cell, over a pamphlet. That is where this story starts, and it is worth sitting with, because it frames everything that comes after. In 2015, Sims got into what he calls the only kind of trouble he had ever been in, his first […]

top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Flynn: US billions for rare earths ‘missing the mark’
top_signals.summary: Retired general says Washington must back juniors, suppliers and workers to build a secure critical minerals supply chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe's innovation performance strengthens amidst global competition
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 09 Jul 2026 Europe's innovation performance continues to improve, with the EU's overall score rising by 11.6 percentage points since 2019, according to the 2026 European Innovation Scoreboard (EIS), just released by the European Commission.
